html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly

The Golden Buoy is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Year of the Dragonfly.

Necessary to create an obstacle for boats during the race. The object will not always be statically in one place. It can be moved by a boat. If you try to crash into it, the Golden Buoy will be pushed away from the boat and push the boat away.

Thorny Buoy

Thorny Buoy acts the same as Golden Buoy, except that the player cannot place them. They can only be created using Charlie's Racer.

Golden Buoy Kit

This item is required to place the Golden Buoy on the water. Unlike other structures, the Golden Buoy Kit can be placed over a long distance. When you place this structure, your character will play an animation in which he will throw a Golden Buoy Kit at the location you specified, after which a Golden Buoy will appear there.

Trivia

  • Thorny Buoy has an unused Thorny Buoy Kit. You can spawn it using a command and use it just like a regular Golden Buoy Kit. Apparently this item is in the game files only so that they fit into Charlie's Racer inventory so they can use them during races.

Assets

Golden Buoy

  • Idle
  • Hit
  • Place

Thorny Buoy

  • Idle
  • Hit
  • Place

Gallery

  • Map icon
  • Unused Thorny Buoy Dropped
  • Unused Thorny Buoy Model

Mob Info

Source
Can be Hammered
Resources
Miscellaneous

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly
“Buoy oh buoy!”
–Wilson, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Don't you dare hit my boat!”
–Willow, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Mighty boat is stronger than tiny buoy... Wolfgang hopes.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Why try to avoid the inevitable?”
–Wendy, when examining a Golden Buoy
“AVOID! AVOID!!”
–WX-78, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Best to avoid that!”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Watch out for that buoy!”
–Woodie, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Out of my way!”
–Maxwell, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Ha! A Viking can maneuver her ship as easily as breathing!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Careful! Don't hit the floaty!”
–Webber, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Buoy ahead!”
–Warly, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Look out!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Buoy ahead!”
–Winona, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Buoy ahoy!”
–Wortox, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Glorp! Don't hit boat!”
–Wurt, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Buoy off the port side! Er, I mean starboard! I'll double check my handbook...”
–Walter, when examining a Golden Buoy
“Botheration, these buoys are slowing me down!”
–Wanda, when examining a Golden Buoy

Golden Buoy Kit[edit | edit source]
Golden Buoy Kit
"One person's buoy is another's barrier."
Object Info
Perk
Can be placed as a Structure.
?? min.
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit"
“Buoy oh buoy!”
–Wilson, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Maybe I could have some fun with this...”
–Willow, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Wolfgang will throw as easily as a tiny pebble!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“A useful guide, or a marker for a watery grave...”
–Wendy, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“DEPLOY THE NAUTICAL SABOTAGE DEVICE!”
–WX-78, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“I wouldn't dream of using any underhanded tactics to win. I'll exercise caution.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Into the water with ya!”
–Woodie, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“A waypoint. Or perhaps a well-timed obstacle...”
–Maxwell, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“I must cast it into the sea!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Where should we throw the floaty?”
–Webber, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Where to put it... I wouldn't want anyone to run into it!”
–Warly, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Throw into water! Wheee!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Better watch where I throw it, wouldn't wanna bust up someone's boat.”
–Winona, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Hyuyu, a bouncing baby buoy!”
–Wortox, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“Don't worry, won't throw in front of your boat! (Hee-hee...)”
–Wurt, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“I'll have it in the water in a jiffy!”
–Walter, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit
“This could be troublesome, if deployed at exactly the right moment...”
–Wanda, when examining a Golden Buoy Kit

When you place this structure, your character will play an animation in which he will throw a Golden Buoy Kit at the location you specified, after which a Golden Buoy will appear there.
